narrative_beat: Relogio do Juizo Final — ponteiros a 85 segundos da meia-noite, luz vermelha pulsante

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive antique Doomsday Clock in dark wood and tarnished brass, hands frozen at 85 seconds to midnight, with pulsing blood-red light emanating from behind the clock face
subject.focal_point: the minute hand trembling near midnight
subject.secondary: Distant mushroom cloud in monochrome behind the clock.
props: massive antique clock in dark wood

environment.location: a grand institutional hall with the clock mounted on a stone wall

composition.foreground: clock face in aged gold and blood-red tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white distant nuclear mushroom cloud through window

lighting.key_light: pulsing blood-red backlight from behind clock
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on clock hands and frame

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
